title: Lesson 58
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: the part of you that thinks and feels
words.example: Keep an open mind when you hear new ideas.

words.meaning: sixty seconds or a very short time
words.example: Wait one minute before opening the door.

words.meaning: coins, bills, or digital value used to buy things
words.example: I saved money for a new bicycle.

words.meaning: sounds made with voices or instruments
words.example: Soft music played in the cafe.

words.meaning: the word used to call a person, place, or thing
words.example: Write your name at the top.
I watch the news after dinner.

words.meaning: thin material used for writing or printing
words.example: Please write your answer on this paper.

words.meaning: a public outdoor area with grass, trees, or paths
words.example: We ate lunch in the park.

words.meaning: a social event with food, music, or games
words.example: Her birthday party starts at six.
